notes.en: Adds Agent cards, portraits, history reflection scanning, AI review, and quality-loop records for reusable Agent memory.
notes.zh-CN: 新增 Agent 卡片、立绘、历史反思扫描、AI 复核和质量闭环记录，用于沉淀可复用的 Agent 记忆。

en: Added Agent cards and portrait-driven Agent browsing.
Added Agent portrait import surfaces and expanded portrait matching.
Added Agent history reflection scanning, AI review, and quality-loop records.
Added background Agent history scanning so long history analysis does not block the main app flow.
Improved Agent memory import and optimization flows with broader history recall.
Improved Agent detail and compact-list behavior.
Tightened Agent history recall, filtered self-pollution, and limited AI review budgets.
zh-CN: 新增 Agent 卡片和立绘浏览入口。
新增 Agent 立绘导入界面并扩展立绘候选匹配。
新增 Agent 历史反思扫描、AI 复核和质量闭环记录。
新增后台 Agent 历史扫描，长历史分析不再阻塞主界面流程。
优化 Agent 记忆导入与优化流程，扩大历史召回范围。
优化 Agent 详情和紧凑列表行为。
收紧 Agent 历史召回，过滤自污染内容，并限制 AI 复核预算。
